message:
test(gmail): add comprehensive unit tests for auth modes, doctor checks, and type serialization

Add ~1787 lines of unit tests across three Gmail connector modules:
- connector.rs: GmailAuthMode labels/summaries, DoctorResult states,
  credential validation, OAuth token refresh, capability verification,
  draft/send operations, attachment handling, error mapping
- error.rs: is_retryable classification, to_fcp_error mapping, rate
  limit handling, all error variant behaviors
- types.rs: serde roundtrip, default values, nested payload structures,
  edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
